title: This Station: The Escape
description:
Late at night, you fall asleep on the last train.

When you wake up, the subway has stopped at a dark, unfamiliar station.
You step out, searching for an exit—but every path leads somewhere stranger.

A long-abandoned platform.
A door leaking faint light.
Beyond it, a perfectly preserved secret laboratory.

No one is here.
Yet scattered clues reveal a shocking truth: a large-scale terrorist attack is being planned.

Gather the evidence.
Escape the facility.
Stop the disaster before it’s too late.

This Station is a slow-burning escape adventure that tests your logic and observation.
There are no enemies. No time limits.
Only the quiet pressure of solving each puzzle as the truth closes in.

Features

• Think to escape. Every puzzle rewards reasoning, not reflexes.

• Combine items and clues to create tools and unlock hidden areas.

• Different ending scenes that reflect how much you uncover before escaping.

• Everyday objects become part of the mystery.

• Supports multiple languages

Every puzzle brings you closer—to escape, and to the truth.
description_short: After falling asleep on the last train, you wake up alone at a dark, unfamiliar terminal station. Instead of an exit, you discover an abandoned platform and a hidden laboratory. Explore, uncover the truth, and escape before a looming disaster becomes reality.
